components.value: V, S, M (a grasshopper’s hind leg)

description.value: The subject gets a +10 enhancement bonus on Acrobatics checks made to attempt high jumps or long jumps. The enhancement bonus increases to +20 at caster level 5th, and to +30 (the maximum) at caster level 9th. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
